subject: [PATCH nfs-utils v2 02/16] support/export: remove unnecessary static variables in nfsd_fh expkey lookup

2026-03-30.patch_summary: This patch removes unnecessary static variables in the nfsd_fh function's CROSSMOUNT submount iteration loop. The prev and mnt variables are only needed to persist across iterations of the inner for loop, not across calls to the function. By converting them from static to local variables, the code is simplified and made more efficient.
